subcodes.first_line: The Book calleth out betwixt the worlds and summoneth the peoples through the Most Great Name, whereat the Tongue of Grandeur gave utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب ینادی بین العالم و یدع الامم بالاسم الاعظم الذی اذا ظهر نطق لسان العظمه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @proclamation to the people of the world, @call to action, @chastisement and requital
